verses.english: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.

commentary.explanation: This refers not just to time, but to the Word (Logos) who is the beginning of all creation.
commentary.theology: The beginning is Christ, through whom all things were made.

verses.english: And the earth was without form, and void...
Thus the heavens and the earth were finished...
The book of the generation of Jesus Christ...

commentary.explanation: Tracing the royal and priestly lineage of the Messiah.
commentary.theology: Connecting the New Covenant with the promises made to Abraham and David.
